verses.text: Paul and Timothy to the saints at Colosse; we give thanks, praying always for you. Thankful prayer. He opens with gratitude for them.
Paul and Timothy to the saints at Colosse; we give thanks, praying always for you. Thankful prayer. He opens with gratitude for them.
Paul and Timothy to the saints at Colosse; we give thanks, praying always for you. Thankful prayer. He opens with gratitude for them.
We heard of your faith and love, for 'the hope... laid up... in heaven'; the gospel brings forth fruit. Fruitful gospel. Faith and love spring from a heavenly hope.
We heard of your faith and love, for 'the hope... laid up... in heaven'; the gospel brings forth fruit. Fruitful gospel. Faith and love spring from a heavenly hope.
We heard of your faith and love, for 'the hope... laid up... in heaven'; the gospel brings forth fruit. Fruitful gospel. Faith and love spring from a heavenly hope.
Ye learned of Epaphras, who declared your love in the Spirit. Faithful teacher. A true minister brought them the word.
Ye learned of Epaphras, who declared your love in the Spirit. Faithful teacher. A true minister brought them the word.
We pray ye be 'filled with the knowledge of his will,' strengthened with all might. Full knowledge. He longs for their growth in wisdom and strength.
We pray ye be 'filled with the knowledge of his will,' strengthened with all might. Full knowledge. He longs for their growth in wisdom and strength.
We pray ye be 'filled with the knowledge of his will,' strengthened with all might. Full knowledge. He longs for their growth in wisdom and strength.
Giving thanks to the Father, who 'hath translated us into the kingdom of his dear Son.' Delivered. We are moved from darkness to Christ's kingdom.
Giving thanks to the Father, who 'hath translated us into the kingdom of his dear Son.' Delivered. We are moved from darkness to Christ's kingdom.
Giving thanks to the Father, who 'hath translated us into the kingdom of his dear Son.' Delivered. We are moved from darkness to Christ's kingdom.
'Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature'; by Him all things were created. Christ supreme. He is God revealed and the Maker of all.
'Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature'; by Him all things were created. Christ supreme. He is God revealed and the Maker of all.
'Who is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of every creature'; by Him all things were created. Christ supreme. He is God revealed and the Maker of all.
He is 'the head of the body, the church'; in Him all fulness dwells, reconciling all by His blood. Head and peace. Christ rules the church and reconciles all to God.
He is 'the head of the body, the church'; in Him all fulness dwells, reconciling all by His blood. Head and peace. Christ rules the church and reconciles all to God.
He is 'the head of the body, the church'; in Him all fulness dwells, reconciling all by His blood. Head and peace. Christ rules the church and reconciles all to God.
You, once enemies, He hath reconciled, to present you holy, 'if ye continue in the faith.' Reconciled. Grace makes foes into holy children.
You, once enemies, He hath reconciled, to present you holy, 'if ye continue in the faith.' Reconciled. Grace makes foes into holy children.
You, once enemies, He hath reconciled, to present you holy, 'if ye continue in the faith.' Reconciled. Grace makes foes into holy children.
I make known the mystery, 'which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.' Indwelling Christ. Christ within is the believer's sure hope.
I make known the mystery, 'which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.' Indwelling Christ. Christ within is the believer's sure hope.
I make known the mystery, 'which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.' Indwelling Christ. Christ within is the believer's sure hope.
I make known the mystery, 'which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.' Indwelling Christ. Christ within is the believer's sure hope.
We preach Christ, that we may 'present every man perfect'; I labour by His working. Faithful labour. He toils by Christ's strength to perfect souls.
